mood: Warm hospitality meets lifestyle magazine — a luxury senior living experience that feels like a boutique resort where families trust, residents thrive, and every detail whispers care
designRules: IDENTITY: Cormorant Garamond headings at dramatic scale (5xl-7xl) create visual gravitas. The golden accent thread — a thin amber line — appears as section dividers throughout for continuity. Warm cream backgrounds only (#FDFAF5), never pure white

COLOR HIERARCHY: Deep teal primary for trust and nature; burnished amber accent reserved for CTAs, badges, and highlights. Use primary/8 and accent/10 for tinted icon backgrounds. Warm-tinted shadows (shadow-accent/5) instead of grey

LAYOUT: Hero with community search bar as primary conversion tool. Care types as 3-column card grid with icon-to-filled hover transition. Stats bar with large tabular-nums. Testimonials in oversized serif quote cards with dot navigation. Blog preview in 3-col grid

COMPONENTS: Cards have rounded-2xl with border-text/5 and hover:-translate-y-1. Buttons use shadow-accent/20 with hover glow. Section headers use tracking-[0.2em] uppercase accent-colored overline labels. Footer in primary bg with golden accent top-border

CONVERSION: Sticky nav with amber CTA button. Search prominently in hero. Schedule-a-Tour CTA after every major section. Phone number always visible. Form with warm surface bg and rounded-3xl container. Trust stats (years, communities, satisfaction) above fold

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-background rounded-2xl p-8 border border-text/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-accent/5 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
designPatterns.button: <a className="bg-accent text-background font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-xl text-lg shadow-lg shadow-accent/20 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-accent/30 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="border border-text/15 text-text font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-surface hover:border-text/25 transition-all">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold text-text tracking-tight" style="text-wrap: balance">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-accent/10 border border-accent/20 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-accent">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full bg-background border border-text/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/30 focus:border-accent/30 transition font-body" />
designPatterns.navStyle: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/85 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-text/5
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="h-14 w-14 rounded-2xl bg-accent/10 flex items-center justify-center text-accent">
